title: BC Real Estate Litigation Roundup
content:
## BC Real Estate Litigation Roundup
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s BC Real Estate Litigation Group for our “BC Real Estate Litigation Roundup” and networking reception. This session brings together leading practitioners and experts involved in B.C. real estate litigation to discuss recent trends and potential future developments in real estate litigation. Topics to be discussed include:
- Recent trends and developments in: construction disputes municipal and land development disputes commercial lease disputes real estate appraisals
- construction disputes
- municipal and land development disputes
- commercial lease disputes
- real estate appraisals
- Future litigation hotspots
A panel of leading practitioners and experts will explore these topics through in-depth discussion and real-world examples:
- Jill Yates , Partner and Vancouver Litigation Group Lead, McCarthy Tétrault
- Alex Cocks , Partner, McCarthy Tétrault
- Ali Al-Ahmad , Senior Managing Director, FTI Consulting
- Nathan Nottingham , Director Valuation, Ryan ULC
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the Law Society of BC's mandatory regime. To register or for questions about this session, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
- Jill Yates, K.C. Managing Partner, BC Region People.Offices.Singular Vancouver
